subcodes.first_line: All things have indeed turned towards God, the Creator of Names, yet most of mankind remain among the remote [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد توجه کل الاشیاء الی الله فاطر الاسماء ولکن الناس اکثرهم من المبعدین قد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @chastisement and requital
